apps.ANTLER: The pAntler launch block. Its Run lines start the MOOS apps in a mission community.
apps.MOOSDB: The MOOS database process used by apps in a community to exchange mail.
apps.pHelmIvP: Runs the IvP Helm. It loads behavior files and publishes desired course, speed, and other decisions.
apps.pLogger: Logs MOOS variables and app output to mission log files.
apps.pMarinePIDV22: Converts desired heading, speed, and optional depth commands into actuator commands for a simulated vehicle.
apps.pMarineViewer: Displays vehicles, appcasts, scope variables, operator buttons, and visual objects.
apps.pMissionEval: Evaluates mission conditions and writes compact pass/fail result rows.
apps.pNodeReporter: Publishes NODE_REPORT messages describing a vehicle's current navigation state.
apps.pShare: Shares selected MOOS variables between communities over configured routes.
apps.uSimMarineV22: Simulates marine vehicle motion from thrust and rudder commands.

parameters.AppTick: The target iterate rate for this app, in Hertz.
parameters.CommsTick: The target MOOS communications rate for this app, in Hertz.
parameters.Community: The MOOS community name for this mission file.
parameters.File: The base log file name used by pLogger.
parameters.FileTimeStamp: Adds a timestamp to pLogger output file names.
parameters.fail_condition: pMissionEval condition that causes the mission evaluation to fail if true.
parameters.LatOrigin: Latitude origin used for local x/y coordinate conversion.
parameters.lead_condition: pMissionEval condition that must become true before a related pass condition is considered.
parameters.LongOrigin: Longitude origin used for local x/y coordinate conversion.
parameters.mission_form: pMissionEval label identifying the mission or test family.
parameters.mission_mod: pMissionEval label identifying the mission variant or case.
parameters.MOOSTimeWarp: Simulation time warp factor applied to MOOS time.
parameters.MSBetweenLaunches: Delay, in milliseconds, between pAntler launching successive apps.
parameters.NewConsole: pAntler Run option controlling whether the app starts in a new console window.
parameters.PATH: Directory path used by pLogger for log output.
parameters.pass_condition: pMissionEval condition that contributes to a passing mission result.
parameters.ProcessConfig: Begins a configuration block for a MOOS app or for ANTLER launch settings.
parameters.Run: pAntler launch entry for starting a MOOS app.
parameters.ServerHost: Host where this community's MOOSDB runs.
parameters.ServerPort: TCP port for this community's MOOSDB.
parameters.WildCardLogging: Enables pLogger wildcard logging for MOOS variables.
parameters.active_start: Starts pMarinePIDV22 in active mode instead of waiting for activation.
parameters.appcast_viewable: Controls whether pMarineViewer shows appcast panes.
parameters.depth_control: Enables depth control in pMarinePIDV22, adding depth-to-pitch and pitch PID loops.
parameters.deprecated: Allows deprecated pMarinePIDV22 parameters where supported by the app.
parameters.domain: IvP decision domain configured for pHelmIvP, such as course or speed.
parameters.max_deceleration: Maximum simulated deceleration used by uSimMarineV22.
parameters.max_speed: Maximum simulated vehicle speed used by uSimMarineV22.
parameters.max_sat_dep_debug: Enables debug reporting for depth-controller saturation in pMarinePIDV22.
parameters.max_sat_hdg_debug: Enables debug reporting for heading-controller saturation in pMarinePIDV22.
parameters.max_sat_spd_debug: Enables debug reporting for speed-controller saturation in pMarinePIDV22.
parameters.maxelevator: Maximum elevator command allowed by the pMarinePIDV22 pitch controller.
parameters.maxpitch: Maximum pitch command allowed by the pMarinePIDV22 depth-to-pitch controller.
parameters.maxrudder: Maximum rudder command allowed by the pMarinePIDV22 yaw controller.
parameters.maxthrust: Maximum thrust command allowed by the pMarinePIDV22 speed controller.
parameters.output_suffix: Suffix appended to pMarinePIDV22 output variables, such as DESIRED_RUDDER.
parameters.pitch_pid_integral_limit: Integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 pitch PID loop.
parameters.pitch_pid_kd: Derivative gain for the pMarinePIDV22 pitch PID loop.
parameters.pitch_pid_ki: Integral gain for the pMarinePIDV22 pitch PID loop.
parameters.pitch_pid_kp: Proportional gain for the pMarinePIDV22 pitch PID loop.
parameters.platform_color: Vehicle display color reported by pNodeReporter.
parameters.post_des_rudder: MOOS variable where uSimMarineV22 reads desired rudder commands.
parameters.post_des_thrust: MOOS variable where uSimMarineV22 reads desired thrust commands.
parameters.prefix: Navigation variable prefix used by uSimMarineV22.
parameters.prereport_column: pMissionEval result column written before the grade/result columns.
parameters.report_column: pMissionEval result column written to the result row.
parameters.report_file: File path where pMissionEval writes result rows.
parameters.result_flag: MOOS flag posted by pMissionEval when evaluation finishes.
parameters.scope: MOOS variable shown in pMarineViewer's scope panel.
parameters.reset_depth_i_at_new_desired: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 depth integral term when a new desired depth is received.
parameters.reset_depth_i_at_zero_error: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 depth integral term when depth error crosses zero.
parameters.reset_heading_i_at_new_desired: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 heading integral term when a new desired heading is received.
parameters.reset_heading_i_at_zero_error: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 heading integral term when heading error crosses zero.
parameters.reset_pitch_i_at_new_desired: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 pitch integral term when a new desired pitch is received.
parameters.reset_pitch_i_at_zero_error: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 pitch integral term when pitch error crosses zero.
parameters.reset_speed_i_at_new_desired: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 speed integral term when a new desired speed is received.
parameters.reset_speed_i_at_zero_error: Resets the pMarinePIDV22 speed integral term when speed error crosses zero.
parameters.sim_instability: Adds bounded simulated rudder bias/instability in pMarinePIDV22 simulation mode.
parameters.speed_factor: Non-negative factor used by pMarinePIDV22 to map desired speed directly to thrust when speed PID is not used.
parameters.speed_pid_integral_limit: Integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 speed PID loop.
parameters.speed_pid_kd: Derivative gain for the pMarinePIDV22 speed PID loop.
parameters.speed_pid_ki: Integral gain for the pMarinePIDV22 speed PID loop.
parameters.speed_pid_ki_limit: Alias-style integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 speed PID loop.
parameters.speed_pid_kp: Proportional gain for the pMarinePIDV22 speed PID loop.
parameters.turn_rate: Simulated vehicle turn rate used by uSimMarineV22.
parameters.turn_spd_loss: Speed loss factor while turning in uSimMarineV22.
parameters.tardy_helm_threshold: Maximum tolerated age for helm command input before pMarinePIDV22 treats it as tardy.
parameters.tardy_nav_threshold: Maximum tolerated age for navigation input before pMarinePIDV22 treats it as tardy.
parameters.verbose: Enables more detailed app output when supported.
parameters.vessel_type: Vehicle type label reported by pNodeReporter.
parameters.yaw_pid_integral_limit: Integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 yaw PID loop.
parameters.yaw_pid_kd: Derivative gain for the pMarinePIDV22 yaw PID loop.
parameters.yaw_pid_ki: Integral gain for the pMarinePIDV22 yaw PID loop.
parameters.yaw_pid_ki_limit: Alias-style integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 yaw PID loop.
parameters.yaw_pid_kp: Proportional gain for the pMarinePIDV22 yaw PID loop.
parameters.z_to_pitch_pid_integral_limit: Integral limit for the pMarinePIDV22 depth-to-pitch PID loop.
parameters.z_to_pitch_pid_kd: Derivative gain for the pMarinePIDV22 depth-to-pitch PID loop.
parameters.z_to_pitch_pid_ki: Integral gain for the pMarinePIDV22 depth-to-pitch PID loop.
parameters.z_to_pitch_pid_kp: Proportional gain for the pMarinePIDV22 depth-to-pitch PID loop.
